notes: Mod sync rework: mods now mirror per-profile across devices. A pull installs only that profile's mod set (no longer the whole mod catalogue, which used to reinstall + re-enable mods you'd removed), and uninstall + enabled/disabled now propagate per-mod (last edit wins). Uninstalling a mod on one device removes it on the other; a mod disabled on one stays disabled on the other. Builds on the v1.10.61 config-sync rewrite.
